## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (enforced by the `commit-msg` hook)
- [ ] If this batch is a release: ran `npm run release` on this branch, then `git push --follow-tags`
- [ ] Reviewed the Netlify deploy preview
- [ ] Will merge with a **merge commit** (not squash) so release tags stay reachable on `main`
